name: Hawaii
agency: Department of Commerce and Consumer Affairs, Business Registration Division
address: King Kalakaua Building, 335 Merchant Street, Room 201, Honolulu, HI 96813

steps: Vote to dissolve the LLC per your operating agreement
Wind up business affairs and settle debts
File final tax returns with Hawaii Department of Taxation
Submit form with $50 filing fee to DCCA BREG by mail, fax, or in person
Notify creditors and claimants of dissolution
Cancel any licenses, permits, and DBAs
llc.notes: Filing fee is nonrefundable. Form can also be filed by fax with credit card payment information included.

steps: Obtain board of directors resolution authorizing dissolution
Wind up business affairs and settle all debts and obligations
File final tax returns with Hawaii Department of Taxation
Submit form with $25 filing fee to DCCA BREG
Notify creditors and claimants of dissolution
Cancel any licenses, permits, and assumed names
corporation.notes: There is also a Form DC-12 for dissolution by incorporators or initial directors before shares are issued.

tax.notes: File final General Excise Tax (GET) return, income tax return, and withholding tax returns. Request a tax clearance certificate from the Department of Taxation before filing dissolution documents.

requirements.employeeNotification: Provide WARN Act notice if applicable (60 days for 50+ employees)
requirements.creditorNotification: Must notify known creditors and claimants of dissolution and provide deadline for claims
requirements.registeredAgentNotes: Registered agent must be maintained until dissolution is complete
requirements.windingUpPeriod: Reasonable period to wind up affairs after filing
requirements.boardOrMemberApproval: LLC: Majority vote of members or per operating agreement. Corporation: Board resolution followed by shareholder approval.

includes: Every required form with direct download links
